SQL Query:
SELECT TOP 10 p.[Sub-Industry], SUM(f.[Trade Value (US$)]) AS TotalTradeValue
                FROM FactTrade f
                INNER JOIN DimCountry rc ON f.ReporterCountryId = rc.CountryID
                INNER JOIN DimCountry pc ON f.PartnerCountryId = pc.CountryID
                INNER JOIN DimProduct p ON f.ProductID = p.ProductID_SK
                WHERE 
                    f.CreationDateKey = '20201231' AND
                    f.Is_Active = 'Y' AND
                    pc.Country <> 'World' AND
                    f.[Trade Flow Code] = 1 AND
                    p.Industry = 'Base Metals and Articles Thereof'
                GROUP BY p.[Sub-Industry]
                ORDER BY 2 DESC
